nasb.text: I have led you forty years in the wilderness; your clothes have not worn out on you, and your sandal has not worn out on your foot.

esv.text: I have led you forty years in the wilderness. Your clothes have not worn out on you, and your sandals have not worn off your feet.

cnv.text: 我在曠野四十年之久領導你們；你們身上的衣服沒有穿破，腳上的鞋也沒有穿壞。

ccb.text: 四十年来，我领你们走过旷野，你们身上的衣服没有穿破，脚上的鞋子没有穿坏；
